specific_question: What was the annual spend on stationery items by MediConn Solutions in 2024?
answer: The annual spend on stationery items was approximately 80,000 CAD by MediConn Solutions in 2024.
justification: Stationery spending is an administrative expense and not relevant to CPPA compliance efforts.
dr_question: As the CPPA Act (Bill C-27) awaits parliamentary decision, how can MediConn build preparedness measures to ensure a smooth transition in the event the Act comes into effect by Q2 2026?
